Drop image or click to open
png · jpg · gif · webp · tiff · bmp
Convert — Options ···
Output format
▾
Compression level (PNG)
85
zlib level: ~8 (85÷10)
Compression effort (WebP)
0 fast 1 2 3 4 5 6 best
Dithering
None Floyd-Steinberg
Strip metadata
▾
Output filename
Output folder
Color profile
▾
Color depth
8-bit 16-bit 32-bit
Resolution (DPI)
Progressive / interlaced
CLI Preview function ▾
magick "photo.jpg" -quality 85 -profile "sRGB" "./output/photo_out.png"
